    Methods in software.amazon.lambda.durable.testing that return TestOperation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TestOperation
    AsyncExecution.getOperation(String name)
    Get details for a specific operation.
    TestOperation
    CloudDurableTestRunner.getOperation(String name)
    Returns the TestOperation for the given name from the last execution result.
    TestOperation
    LocalDurableTestRunner.getOperation(String name)
    Returns the TestOperation for the given operation name, or null if not found.
    TestOperation
    TestResult.getOperation(String name)
    Returns the TestOperation with the given name, or null if not found.
    Methods in software.amazon.lambda.durable.testing that return types with arguments of type TestOperation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<TestOperation>
    TestResult.getFailedOperations()
    Returns all operations that failed, were cancelled, timed out, or stopped.
    List<TestOperation>
    AsyncExecution.getOperations()
    Get all operations in the execution.
    List<TestOperation>
    TestResult.getOperations()
    Returns all operations from the execution.
    List<TestOperation>
    TestResult.getSucceededOperations()
    Returns all operations that completed successfully.
